LAW AND MOTION 302: REGARINDG: DEFENDANTS KYO-YA HOTELS & RESORTS AND STARWOOD HOTELS & RESORTS WORLDWIDE'S MOTION FOR PROTECTIVE ORDER REGARDING PLAINTIFF WRITTEN DISCOVERY - DEFENDANTS ARE REQUIRED TO RESPOND TO DOCUMENT REQUESTS 1, 10-14, 15 (BUT ONLY AS TO THE TIME PERIOD DECEMBER 1, 2013 TO THE PRESENT), 16-22, 23 (BUT ONLY AS TO THE TIME PERIOD DECEMBER 1, 2013 TO THE PRESENT), 26, AND 28-31. DEFENDANTS ARE ALSO REQUIRED TO RESPOND TO ALL THE FORM INTERROGATORIES AND REQUESTS FOR ADMISSIONS SERVED ON THEM. ALL OF DEFENDANTS' RESPONSES, INCLUDING THEIR PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS, MUST OCCUR NO LATER THAN MAY 2, 2016. THE PARTIES ARE TO FURTHER MEET AND CONFER AND RAISE ANY REMAINING ISSUES AT A FURTHER HEARING SET FOR MAY 10, 2016 AT 9:30 A.M., IN DEPT. 302. MS. ROTHBERG IS TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER. Notice Of Motion And Motion For Protective Order Regarding Plaintiff Written Discovery
Off Calendar Apr-13-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Shaun Sullivan of Bracamontes & Vlasak telephone number 415-835-6777 for Plaintiff Meredith Smith.
Stephanie Rothberg of WFBM, LLP telephone number 415-781-7072 for Defendants Kyo-Ya Hotels, LP dba The Palace Hotel and Starwood Hotels & Resorts Worldwide Inc.

The matter was argued. Upon conclusion of argument, the Court confirmed part of its tentative ruling. In re: DEFENDANTS KYO-YA HOTELS & RESORTS and STARWOOD HOTELS & RESORTS WORLDWIDE'S Motion For Protective Order Regarding Plaintiff Written Discovery - Defendants are required to respond to document requests 1, 10-14, 15 (but only as to the time period December 1, 2013 to the present), 16-22, 23 (but only as to the time period December 1, 2013 to the present), 26, and 28-31. Defendants are also required to respond to all the form interrogatories and requests for admissions served on them. All of defendants' responses, including their production of documents, must occur no later than May 2, 2016. The parties are to further meet and confer and raise any remaining issues at a further hearing set for May 10, 2016 at 9:30 a.m., in Dept. 302. Ms. Rothberg is to prepare a form of order.

Judge: Harold Kahn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976. (302/HK)
